title: Bounded repo-continuity and pending-graduations consolidation pass
body: No active claims reported by claims list. Flamebright Sparking Forge is opening a narrow claim for repo-continuity.md and pending-graduations.md only; scope is reconciliation of live state vs historical prose and pending due/index counts. Cost-of-collaboration P0 remains in view, so no multi-agent implementation window or staging is planned.
